output.note: DECISION-SUPPORT DRAFT — not an official Taxonomy disclosure. Technical Screening Criteria (SC + DNSH) are activity-specific and defined in the applicable Delegated Act annex for the NACE code. reference.delegated_acts: Climate Delegated Act + Environmental Delegated Act (consolidated, Omnibus I revisions in force 28 Jan 2026). Verify current edition at eur-lex.europa.eu.
